```text
ROLE: SUPERVISOR_KICKOFF

INSTRUCTION:
You are the stage supervisor. Use only the observation fields. Output a global objective and one executable initial contract. Operational fields will be compiled and enforced. Put human-readable text only in explanation.

CONTEXT:
{
  "user_goal": "Prioritize valuable task coverage, then reduce resource use.",
  "observation": {
    "observation_id": "O0",
    "frame_type": "supervisor_kickoff",
    "role": "supervisor",
    "user_goal": "Prioritize valuable task coverage, then reduce resource use.",
    "budget_caps": {
      "max_solver_actions": 10,
      "max_time_sec": 300.0,

{
  "type": "object",

  "properties": {
    "supervisor_decision": {
      "type": "object",

        "action": {
          "type": "string",
          "const": "start_run"
        },

          "type": "object",
          "description": "Run-level objective used to compare global best solutions.",
          "properties": {
            "objective_layers": {
              "type": "array",
              "description": "Ordered global quality metrics. Earlier metrics dominate later metrics.",
              "minItems": 1,
              "maxItems": 4,
              "items": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "missed_priority",
                  "unassigned_count",
                  "energy_total",
                  "total_distance",
                  "makespan",
                  "route_balance"
                ]
              }
            },
            "explanation": {
              "type": "object",
              "description": "Human-readable explanation ignored by validator/compiler/runtime.",
              "additionalProperties": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "objective_layers"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        },
        "next_contract": {
          "type": "object",
          "description": "A supervisor-issued executable search contract.",
          "properties": {
            "contract_type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "initial_construction",
                "alns_search",

                "final_refinement"

            "objective_layers": {
              "type": "array",
```

```text
{
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "start_run",
    "global_objective": {
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "explanation": {
        "order": "First minimize missed_priority (valuable task coverage), then minimize total energy consumption (resource reduction)."
      }
    },
    "next_contract": {
      "contract_type": "initial_construction",
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "feasibility_control": {
        "mode": "strict",
        "relaxation_ratios": []
      },
      "target_policy": {
        "preferred_target_kinds": [
          "unassigned_priority"
        ]
      },
      "protected_metrics": [],
      "resource_policy": {
        "min_actions": 1,
        "max_actions": 10,
        "max_iters": 2000,
        "max_time_sec": 300.0
      },
      "exit_conditions": {
        "success": [
          {
            "condition_id": "feasible_solution_found",
            "source": "best_feasible.exists",
            "op": "==",
            "value": true,
            "window": 3
          }
        ],
        "failure": [
          {
            "condition_id": "actions_exhausted",
            "source": "progress.solver_actions",
            "op": ">=",
            "value": 10,
            "window": 1
          }
        ]
      },
      "explanation": {
        "objective": "Construct initial feasible solution prioritizing high-priority tasks and minimizing energy.",
        "feasibility": "Strict mode to ensure solution is immediately feasible.",
        "target": "Focus on covering all high-priority tasks.",
        "resource": "Use up to 10 solver actions or 300 seconds.",
        "exit": "Success if feasible solution found; failure if actions exhausted without feasible solution."
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```json
    "max_iters": 2000,
    "max_time_sec": 300.0
  },
  "exit_conditions": {
    "success": [
      {
        "condition_id": "feasible_solution_found",
        "source": "best_feasible.exists",
        "op": "==",
        "value": true,
        "window": 3
      }
    ],
    "failure": [
      {
        "condition_id": "actions_exhausted",
        "source": "progress.solver_actions",
        "op": ">=",
        "value": 10,
        "window": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "explanation": {
    "objective": "Construct initial feasible solution prioritizing high-priority tasks and minimizing energy.",
    "feasibility": "Strict mode to ensure solution is immediately feasible.",
    "target": "Focus on covering all high-priority tasks.",
    "resource": "Use up to 10 solver actions or 300 seconds.",
    "exit": "Success if feasible solution found; failure if actions exhausted without feasible solution."
  }
}
```

```json
        {
```
```text
          "name": "future_slack",
          "score": 7
        }
      ]
    },
    "explanation": {
      "summary": "Focus on the large unassigned priority bucket to maximize valuable task coverage.   }
```

```text
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "issue_contract",
    "contract_review": {
      "outcome_summary": "Initial construction found a feasible solution with 18 missed priority tasks and 14 unassigned tasks, using only 1 solver action. The solution has high energy and distance, but is feasible.",
      "main_lesson": "Feasibility is achieved; now focus on improving coverage of high-priority tasks to reduce missed_priority and unassigned_count before optimizing resource usage."
    },
    "next_contract": {
      "contract_type": "alns_search",

        "missed_priority",
        "unassigned_count",

          }

      },
      "explanation": {
        "rationale": "Use ALNS to reduce missed_priority and unassigned_count, protecting those metrics from worsening, while allowing energy to change as a trade-off. Resource limit set to use remaining 8 solver actions."

    }
  }
```

```json
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "issue_contract",
    "contract_review": {
      "outcome_summary": "Initial construction found a feasible solution with 18 missed priority tasks and 14 unassigned tasks, using only 1 solver action. The solution has high energy and distance, but is feasible.",
      "main_lesson": "Feasibility is achieved; now focus on improving coverage of high-priority tasks to reduce missed_priority and unassigned_count before optimizing resource usage."
    },
    "next_contract": {
      "contract_type": "alns_search",
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "unassigned_count",
        "energy_total"
      ],

        "relaxation_ratios": []

}
```

```text
      "aim": "Focus on inserting high-priority unassigned tasks while protecting feasibility. Use scarcity-first and regret insertion with priority and scarcity signals. Gentle destroy to enable reshuffling. Greedy acceptance ensures no worsening of protected metrics."
    }
  }
}
```

```text
                          "condition_id": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Stable id unique inside this contract condition set."
                          },
                          "source": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "progress.solver_actions",
                              "progress.iters_used",
                              "progress.time_used_sec",
                              "last.intent_status",
                              "last.dominant_blocker",
                              "last.best_improved",
                              "aggregate.achieved",
                              "aggregate.partial",
                              "aggregate.not_achieved",
                              "aggregate.regressed",
                              "aggregate.solver_requested_review",
                              "working.is_feasible",
                              "working.missed_priority",
                              "working.unassigned_count",
                              "working.energy_total",
                              "working.total_distance",
                              "working.makespan",
                              "working.route_balance",
                              "best_feasible.exists",
                              "best_feasible.missed_priority",
                              "best_feasible.unassigned_count",
                              "best_feasible.energy_total",
                              "best_feasible.total_distance",
                              "best_feasible.makespan",
                              "best_feasible.route_balance"
                            ],
                            "description": "Executable source path read by ContractMonitor."
                          },
                          "op": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "<",
                              "<=",
                              "==",
                              "!=",
                              ">=",
                              ">"
                            ]
                          },
                          "value": {
                            "type": [
                              "number",
                              "string",
                              "boolean"
                            ]
                          },
                          "window": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "minimum": 1,
                            "maximum": 20
                          }
                        },
                        "required": [
                          "condition_id",
                          "source",
                          "op",
                          "value",
                          "window"
                        ],
                        "additionalProperties": false
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  "required": [
                    "success",
                    "failure"
                  ],
                  "additionalProperties": false
                },
                "explanation": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Human-readable explanation ignored by validator/compiler/runtime.",
                  "additionalProperties": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "contract_type",
                "objective_layers",
                "feasibility_control",
                "target_policy",
                "protected_metrics",
                "resource_policy",
                "exit_conditions"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "action",
            "contract_review",
            "next_contract"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        },
        {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "action": {
              "type": "string",
              "const": "stop_run"
            },
            "contract_review": {
              "type": "object",
              "description": "Human-readable review ignored by runtime.",
              "properties": {
                "outcome_summary": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "What happened during the completed contract."
                },
                "main_lesson": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Most important lesson for the next stage."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "outcome_summary",
                "main_lesson"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            },
            "stop_explanation": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "Why the supervisor decides the run should stop."
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "action",
            "contract_review",
            "stop_explanation"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "supervisor_decision"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

<details>

```text
{
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "issue_contract",
    "contract_review": {
```
```text
      "outcome_summary": "Contract C003 (alns_search) successfully improved energy_total from 63104.15 to 62623.91, with best feasible solution now at missed_priority=9, unassigned_count=6, energy_total=62623.91, total_distance=56245.78. The working solution has lower energy (53638.54) but higher missed_priority (26) and unassigned_count (13). The contract terminated early due to improvement condition, having used only 1 solver action and 32.81 seconds.",
```

```text
                              "best_feasible.total_distance",
                              "best_feasible.makespan",
                              "best_feasible.route_balance"
                            ],
                            "description": "Executable source path read by ContractMonitor."
                          },
                          "op": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "<",
                              "<=",
                              "==",
                              "!=",
                              ">=",
                              ">"
                            ]
                          },
                          "value": {
                            "type": [
                              "number",
                              "string",
                              "boolean"
                            ]
                          },
                          "window": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "minimum": 1,
                            "maximum": 20
                          }
                        },
                        "required": [
                          "condition_id",
                          "source",
                          "op",
                          "value",
                          "window"
                        ],
                        "additionalProperties": false
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  "required": [
                    "success",
                    "failure"
                  ],
                  "additionalProperties": false
                },
                "explanation": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Human-readable explanation ignored by validator/compiler/runtime.",
                  "additionalProperties": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "contract_type",
                "objective_layers",
                "feasibility_control",
                "target_policy",
                "protected_metrics",
                "resource_policy",
                "exit_conditions"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "action",
            "contract_review",
            "next_contract"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        },
        {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "action": {
              "type": "string",
              "const": "stop_run"
            },
            "contract_review": {
              "type": "object",
              "description": "Human-readable review ignored by runtime.",
              "properties": {
                "outcome_summary": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "What happened during the completed contract."
                },
                "main_lesson": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Most important lesson for the next stage."
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "outcome_summary",
                "main_lesson"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            },
            "stop_explanation": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "Why the supervisor decides the run should stop."
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "action",
            "contract_review",
            "stop_explanation"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "supervisor_decision"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

</details>

```text
INSTRUCTION:
Choose one allowed action. If executing a solver action, choose one target_id from decision_targets and choose controls only from action_space.       "strategy": "Target unassigned priority tasks, use related cluster removal with mobility opportunity to free up capacity, then scarcity-first insertion with priority and scarcity signals to assign high-value tasks while minimizing energy impact. Greedy acceptance ensures no degradation of protected metrics."
    }
  }
}
```

```text
    }
  }

{
```
```text
  "supervisor_decision": {
```
```text
    "action": "stop_run",
    "contract_review": {
      "outcome_summary": "Contract C006 (alns_search) failed to improve missed_priority and unassigned_count, ending due to exhausted solver actions and time. Working solution remains feasible with missed_priority=5, unassigned=5, energy=67944, but best feasible is slightly worse on unassigned (6). Stage verification shows 3 partial and 1 not_achieved; last verification had zero metric delta and no_quality_gain blocker.",
      "main_lesson": "Under strict protection of priority and unassigned metrics, the solver could not find any improvement, indicating that the current solution may be locally optimal or that further search under zero additional solver actions and no time budget is unlikely to yield progress."
    },
    "stop_explanation": "The budget caps for the next contract are zero for solver actions and time, making any meaningful optimization impossible. The solver has already exhausted its allocated resources without quality gain, and the dominant blocker is no_quality_gain. Per user goal to prioritize coverage then reduce resource use, continuing would waste resources with no prospect of improvement."
  }
}
```
